files.Title: Trellis.Aggregate<TId>
files.Summary: Base class for aggregate roots in Domain-Driven Design. An aggregate is a cluster of domain objects (entities and value objects) that form a consistency boundary. The aggregate root is the only entry point for modifications and ensures all invariants within the boundary are maintained.

files.Title: Trellis.AggregateETagExtensions
files.Summary:
Extension methods for ETag-based optimistic concurrency validation on aggregate results. Two modes are available — the service owner chooses which to use:

  • — If-Match is optional (skips if absent)
  • — If-Match is required (428 if absent)

files.Title: Trellis.AsUnitExtensions
files.Summary: Asynchronous bridges that discard a result's success value and project to a no-payload Result<Unit>. Pairs with for sync receivers.

files.Title: Trellis.Asp.ActionResultAdapterExtensions
files.Summary: MVC adapter that wraps an in an so MVC controllers can declare typed return signatures (e.g. Task<ActionResult<TodoResponse>>) for OpenAPI inference and [ProducesResponseType<T>] compatibility.

files.Title: Trellis.Asp.AggregateRepresentationValidator<T>
files.Summary: Default representation validator for aggregates. Uses the aggregate's built-in ETag. When a variant key is provided, combines it with the ETag using a hash.

files.Title: Trellis.Asp.Authorization.CachingActorProvider
files.Summary: Decorating that caches the result of the inner provider so that multiple calls within the same scope return the same actor without repeating expensive operations (e.g., database lookups).

files.Title: Trellis.Asp.Authorization.ClaimsActorOptions
files.Summary: Configuration options for . Controls which claims are used for actor identity and permissions.

files.Title: Trellis.Asp.Authorization.ClaimsActorProvider
files.Summary: implementation that hydrates an from the current using standard JWT/OIDC claims. Works with any identity provider (Auth0, Keycloak, Okta, Entra, etc.).

files.Title: Trellis.Asp.Authorization.DevelopmentActorOptions
files.Summary: Configuration options for . Controls the fallback actor used when no X-Test-Actor header is present, and error handling for malformed headers.

files.Title: Trellis.Asp.Authorization.DevelopmentActorProvider
files.Summary: implementation for development and testing that reads actor identity from the X-Test-Actor HTTP header.

files.Title: Trellis.Asp.Authorization.EntraActorOptions
files.Summary: Configuration options for . Controls how Azure Entra ID v2.0 JWT claims are mapped to properties.

files.Title: Trellis.Asp.Authorization.EntraActorProvider
files.Summary: implementation that hydrates an from the current using Azure Entra ID v2.0 JWT claims. Extends with Entra-specific claim mapping for permissions, forbidden permissions, and ABAC attributes.

files.Title: Trellis.Asp.Authorization.ServiceCollectionExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods for registering actor providers in ASP.NET Core DI.

files.Title: Trellis.Asp.ETagHelper
files.Summary: RFC 9110-compliant entity tag comparison helpers.

files.Title: Trellis.Asp.HttpResponseExtensions
files.Summary: The single Trellis verb for converting / / values to ASP.NET Core HTTP responses. Works in both Minimal API endpoints and MVC controllers (.NET 7+ executes natively in MVC). For typed ActionResult<T> signatures, chain .

files.Title: Trellis.Asp.HttpResponseOptionsBuilder<TDomain>
files.Summary: Fluent options builder for . Selectors run against the TDomain value (not the projected response body).

files.Title: Trellis.Asp.HttpResponseOptionsBuilder
files.Summary: Non-generic builder used for (no value).

files.Title: Trellis.Asp.IRepresentationValidator<T>
files.Summary: Strategy for generating representation-specific validators (ETags) that account for content negotiation variants per RFC 9110 §8.8.3.1/§8.8.3.3.

files.Title: Trellis.Asp.IfNoneMatchExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods for If-None-Match validation on unsafe methods (create-if-absent patterns).

files.Title: Trellis.Asp.ModelBinding.MaybeModelBinder<TValue, TPrimitive>
files.Summary: Model binder for parameters where TValue implements . Binds optional route, query, form, and header parameters to .

files.Title: Trellis.Asp.ModelBinding.ScalarValueModelBinder<TValue, TPrimitive>
files.Summary: Model binder for scalar value types. Validates scalar values during model binding by calling TryCreate.

files.Title: Trellis.Asp.ModelBinding.ScalarValueModelBinderBase<TResult, TValue, TPrimitive>
files.Summary: Base model binder for scalar value types that handles primitive conversion, validation via TryCreate, and error collection.

files.Title: Trellis.Asp.ModelBinding.ScalarValueModelBinderProvider
files.Summary: Detects scalar value types and wrapping scalar value types, and provides model binders for them.

files.Title: Trellis.Asp.PageLink
files.Summary: A cursor + the absolute URL the client should follow to fetch the linked page.

files.Title: Trellis.Asp.PagedResponse<TResponse>
files.Summary: JSON envelope wrapping a single page of items and its cursor links.

files.Title: Trellis.Asp.PartialContentHttpResult
files.Summary: A Minimal API that returns HTTP 206 Partial Content with a Content-Range header. Used to indicate that the response contains a subset of the requested resource.

files.Title: Trellis.Asp.PartialContentResult
files.Summary: Represents an that returns HTTP 206 Partial Content with a Content-Range header. Used to indicate that the response contains a subset of the requested resource.

files.Title: Trellis.Asp.PreferHeader
files.Summary: Parses the RFC 7240 Prefer request header and exposes standard preference tokens.

files.Title: Trellis.Asp.RangeOutcome.FullRepresentation
files.Summary: No Range header or range not applicable — serve full representation.

files.Title: Trellis.Asp.RangeOutcome.NotSatisfiable
files.Summary: Range not satisfiable (416).

files.Title: Trellis.Asp.RangeOutcome.PartialContent
files.Summary: Range satisfiable — serve partial content (206).

files.Title: Trellis.Asp.RangeOutcome
files.Summary: Result of evaluating a Range request per RFC 9110 §14.

files.Title: Trellis.Asp.RangeRequestEvaluator
files.Summary: Evaluates RFC 9110 §14 Range request headers. Only supports byte ranges. Non-GET requests are treated as Full (Range ignored).

files.Title: Trellis.Asp.Routing.RouteConstraintRegistrationExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods that register Trellis value objects as ASP.NET Core route constraints.

files.Title: Trellis.Asp.Routing.TrellisValueObjectRouteConstraint<T>
files.Summary: Route constraint that delegates parsing to the value object's implementation. Used by AddTrellisRouteConstraints to make {id:ProductId}-style route templates work for any Trellis value object.

files.Title: Trellis.Asp.RuleViolationProblemDetail
files.Summary: JSON shape used for rule violations in ProblemDetails extensions.

files.Title: Trellis.Asp.ScalarValueValidationEndpointFilter
files.Summary: An endpoint filter that checks for scalar value validation errors collected during JSON deserialization. For Minimal APIs, this filter returns validation problem results when validation errors are detected.

files.Title: Trellis.Asp.ScalarValueValidationFilter
files.Summary: An action filter that checks for validation errors collected during JSON deserialization and validates route/query parameters. Returns a 400 Bad Request response with validation problem details when validation fails.

files.Title: Trellis.Asp.ScalarValueValidationMiddleware
files.Summary: Middleware that creates a validation error collection scope for each request. This enables ValidatingJsonConverter to collect validation errors across the entire request deserialization process.

files.Title: Trellis.Asp.ServiceCollectionExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods for configuring automatic value object validation in ASP.NET Core.

files.Title: Trellis.Asp.TrellisAspOptions
files.Summary: Configuration options for Trellis ASP.NET Core integration. Controls how domain error types are mapped to HTTP status codes.

files.Title: Trellis.Asp.Validation.MaybeScalarValueJsonConverter<TValue, TPrimitive>
files.Summary: A JSON converter for properties where TValue implements .

files.Title: Trellis.Asp.Validation.MaybeScalarValueJsonConverterFactory
files.Summary: Factory for creating instances for properties where T implements .

files.Title: Trellis.Asp.Validation.ScalarValueJsonConverterBase<TResult, TValue, TPrimitive>
files.Summary: Base JSON converter for scalar value objects that collects validation errors instead of throwing exceptions during deserialization.

files.Title: Trellis.Asp.Validation.ValidatingJsonConverter<TValue, TPrimitive>
files.Summary: A JSON converter for value objects that implement . This converter collects validation errors instead of throwing exceptions, enabling comprehensive validation error responses.

files.Title: Trellis.Asp.Validation.ValidatingJsonConverterFactory
files.Summary: Factory for creating validating JSON converters for types.

files.Title: Trellis.Asp.ValidationErrorsContext
files.Summary: Provides a context for collecting validation errors during JSON deserialization. Uses AsyncLocal to maintain thread-safe, request-scoped error collection.

files.Title: Trellis.AuthChallenge
files.Summary: Represents a single HTTP authentication challenge (RFC 9110 §11.6.1) carried by . Multiple challenges may be combined to round-trip the full WWW-Authenticate header.

files.Title: Trellis.Authorization.Actor
files.Summary: Represents the current authenticated user making the request. Contains identity, permissions, forbidden permissions, and contextual attributes used by authorization behaviors.

files.Title: Trellis.Authorization.ActorAttributes
files.Summary: Well-known attribute keys for used in attribute-based access control (ABAC) checks. Claim-based keys align with Azure Entra ID v2.0 access token claims. Use these constants instead of raw strings to prevent key-casing mismatches.

files.Title: Trellis.Authorization.IActorProvider
files.Summary: Provides the current authenticated actor for authorization behaviors. Implement in the API/ACL layer, typically extracting from HttpContext.User or resolving permissions from a database. Register as scoped in DI.

files.Title: Trellis.Authorization.IAuthorize
files.Summary: Marker interface for commands/queries that require static permissions. Authorization checks verify that the current actor has ALL of the before calling the handler.

files.Title: Trellis.Authorization.IAuthorizeResource<TResource>
files.Summary: Declares resource-based authorization that requires a loaded resource. Implemented by the command/query. The pipeline loads the resource via and passes it to this method.

files.Title: Trellis.Authorization.IIdentifyResource<TResource, TId>
files.Summary: Declares that this message carries a typed resource identifier that can be extracted for resource-based authorization. Implement alongside to use a instead of a per-command .

files.Title: Trellis.Authorization.IResourceLoader<TMessage, TResource>
files.Summary: Loads the resource required for resource-based authorization. Registered in DI as scoped (typically depends on DbContext via a repository). Resolved per-request by the pipeline behavior via .

files.Title: Trellis.Authorization.ResourceLoaderById<TMessage, TResource, TId>
files.Summary: Convenience base class for resource loaders that extract a typed ID from the message and load via a repository's GetByIdAsync method.

files.Title: Trellis.Authorization.SharedResourceLoaderById<TResource, TId>
files.Summary: Shared resource loader that loads a resource by ID. Register one per resource type instead of one per command.

files.Title: Trellis.BindExtensions
files.Summary: Provides extension methods for binding (chaining) operations over Result values.

files.Title: Trellis.BindExtensionsAsync
files.Summary: Provides asynchronous extension methods for binding (chaining) operations over Result values.

files.Title: Trellis.BindZipExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods that bind a function to a Result and zip the original value with the new value into a tuple. Enables sequential accumulation of values through a pipeline.

files.Title: Trellis.BindZipExtensionsAsync
files.Summary: Async BindZip extensions where both input and function are async (Task).

files.Title: Trellis.CheckExtensions
files.Summary: Provides extension methods for running validation functions on Result values while preserving the original value on success. If the check fails, its failure is returned.

files.Title: Trellis.CheckExtensionsAsync
files.Summary: Async Check extensions where BOTH input and check function are async (Task).

files.Title: Trellis.CheckIfExtensions
files.Summary: Provides conditional check extension methods for Result values. The check function is only invoked when the condition or predicate is true; otherwise the original result passes through unchanged.

files.Title: Trellis.CheckIfExtensionsAsync
files.Summary: Async CheckIf extensions where BOTH input and check function are async (Task).

files.Title: Trellis.CombineErrorExtensions
files.Summary: Combines two values into one. Two values merge their field/rule violations. Otherwise the two errors are flattened into an .

files.Title: Trellis.CombineExtensions
files.Summary: Combines two or more into one tuple containing all the Results.

files.Title: Trellis.CombineExtensionsAsync
files.Summary: Combines two or more into one tuple containing all the Results.

files.Title: Trellis.Cursor
files.Summary: Opaque pagination cursor exchanged between server and client. Servers MUST treat the contents as their own private encoding; clients MUST treat it as a black box and only echo it back on the next request.

files.Title: Trellis.DiscardExtensions
files.Summary: Provides extension methods for explicitly discarding a Result value. Use when the outcome is intentionally ignored (e.g., best-effort operations). This is the idiomatic alternative to _ = result; and suppresses TRLS001 without requiring pragma directives.

files.Title: Trellis.DiscardTaskExtensions
files.Summary: Provides async extension methods for explicitly discarding a Task-wrapped Result value.

files.Title: Trellis.DiscardValueTaskExtensions
files.Summary: Provides async extension methods for explicitly discarding a ValueTask-wrapped Result value.

files.Title: Trellis.EnsureAllExtensions
files.Summary: Provides extension methods for ensuring multiple conditions on Result values simultaneously. Unlike which short-circuits on the first failure, EnsureAll runs ALL checks and accumulates errors into a single combined error.

files.Title: Trellis.EnsureAllExtensionsAsync
files.Summary: Provides asynchronous extension methods for EnsureAll validation accumulation on Result values.

files.Title: Trellis.EnsureExtensions
files.Summary: Provides extension methods for ensuring conditions on Result values. If conditions fail, the result is converted to a failure with the specified error.

files.Title: Trellis.EnsureExtensionsAsync
files.Summary: Async Ensure extensions where BOTH input and predicates are async (Task).

files.Title: Trellis.Entity<TId>
files.Summary: Base class for entities in Domain-Driven Design. An entity is a domain object defined by its identity rather than its attributes. Two entities with different attributes but the same ID are considered equal.

files.Title: Trellis.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods on that wrap and convert expected database exceptions to failures.

files.Title: Trellis.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextOptionsBuilderExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods for that register Trellis EF Core interceptors.

files.Title: Trellis.EntityFrameworkCore.DbExceptionClassifier
files.Summary: Classifies database exceptions across providers (SQL Server, PostgreSQL, SQLite). Used internally by both and overloads. Also available for direct use in repositories that need custom error messages per exception type.

files.Title: Trellis.EntityFrameworkCore.EfUnitOfWork<TContext>
files.Summary: EF Core implementation of . Delegates to which already maps to , duplicate-key exceptions to , and foreign-key violations to .

files.Title: Trellis.EntityFrameworkCore.EntityTimestampInterceptor
files.Summary: EF Core SaveChanges interceptor that automatically sets and on entities before save.

files.Title: Trellis.EntityFrameworkCore.IUnitOfWork
files.Summary:
Abstraction over the commit boundary for staged changes. Repositories stage changes; calling persists them.

In the standard Trellis pipeline, commit is handled automatically by after a successful handler. Inject directly only in non-pipeline scenarios (background jobs, integration tests, etc.).

files.Title: Trellis.EntityFrameworkCore.MaybeEntityTypeBuilderExtensions
files.Summary: Entity type builder helpers that resolve properties to their mapped storage members.

files.Title: Trellis.EntityFrameworkCore.MaybeModelExtensions
files.Summary: Diagnostics helpers for inspecting resolved EF Core mappings for properties.

files.Title: Trellis.EntityFrameworkCore.MaybePropertyMapping
files.Summary: Describes how a property resolved to an EF Core mapped backing field.

files.Title: Trellis.EntityFrameworkCore.MaybeQueryInterceptor
files.Summary: An EF Core query expression interceptor that automatically rewrites property accesses in LINQ expression trees to their underlying storage member equivalents.

files.Title: Trellis.EntityFrameworkCore.MaybeQueryableExtensions
files.Summary: LINQ query extensions for properties backed by generated nullable storage members. These methods rewrite the expression tree to target the underlying _camelCase storage member via , enabling EF Core to translate the query to SQL.

files.Title: Trellis.EntityFrameworkCore.MaybeUpdateExtensions
files.Summary: ExecuteUpdate helpers for setting and clearing mapped properties via CLR selectors.

files.Title: Trellis.EntityFrameworkCore.ModelConfigurationBuilderExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods for that register Trellis value object conventions before EF Core model building.

files.Title: Trellis.EntityFrameworkCore.OwnedEntityAttribute
files.Summary: Marks a composite as an EF Core owned entity type, triggering source generation of the private parameterless constructor required for EF Core materialization.

files.Title: Trellis.EntityFrameworkCore.QueryableExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods on that wrap EF Core query results in or .

files.Title: Trellis.EntityFrameworkCore.RepositoryBase<TAggregate, TId>
files.Summary: Base class for EF Core repositories that persist instances. Provides standard read and staging methods. Repositories stage changes to the change tracker; the (typically driven by a pipeline behavior) is responsible for committing staged changes.

files.Title: Trellis.EntityFrameworkCore.ScalarValueQueryInterceptor
files.Summary: An EF Core query expression interceptor that enables natural scalar value object syntax in LINQ queries — comparisons, string methods, and properties translate to SQL without requiring .Value.

files.Title: Trellis.EntityFrameworkCore.TransactionalCommandBehavior<TMessage, TResponse>
files.Summary:
Pipeline behavior that automatically commits staged changes after a successful command handler.

The behavior calls next to run the handler (which stages changes via repositories), then calls if the handler returned success. If the handler returned a failure , no commit occurs and the staged changes are discarded when the is disposed.

This behavior is constrained to messages — queries are not wrapped and incur no overhead.

Atomicity: EF Core wraps each SaveChanges call in an implicit database transaction, so all staged changes within a single handler are committed atomically. Cross-aggregate operations that share the same are automatically transactional.

files.Title: Trellis.EntityFrameworkCore.TrellisPersistenceMappingException
files.Summary: Represents a failure to materialize a Trellis value object from persisted data.

files.Title: Trellis.EntityFrameworkCore.TrellisScalarConverter<TModel, TProvider>
files.Summary:
Value converter for Trellis types.

Converts to database using the Value property and from database using the type's validation factory methods. Invalid persisted values throw with explicit materialization details.

files.Title: Trellis.EntityFrameworkCore.UnitOfWorkServiceCollectionExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods for registering and the pipeline behavior.

files.Title: Trellis.EntityTagValue
files.Summary: Represents an RFC 9110 §8.8.1 entity tag (ETag) value with explicit weak/strong semantics.

files.Title: Trellis.EnumValueAttribute
files.Summary: Specifies the canonical symbolic value for a member.

files.Title: Trellis.EquatableArray<T>
files.Summary: Wraps an to provide structural (sequence) equality.

files.Title: Trellis.EquatableArray
files.Summary: Non-generic factory helpers for that allow type inference.

files.Title: Trellis.Error.Aggregate
files.Summary: Composition of multiple independent errors. Used when several failures occur together (e.g. parallel operations, batch validation). On the wire this typically renders as a problem-details extensions.errors array; 207 Multi-Status is reserved for explicit batch endpoints.

files.Title: Trellis.Error.BadRequest
files.Summary: HTTP 400 — the request is syntactically or semantically malformed.

files.Title: Trellis.Error.Conflict
files.Summary: HTTP 409 — the request conflicts with the current state of the resource.

files.Title: Trellis.Error.ContentTooLarge
files.Summary: HTTP 413 — the request payload exceeds size limits.

files.Title: Trellis.Error.Forbidden
files.Summary: HTTP 403 — authorization policy refused the request.

files.Title: Trellis.Error.Gone
files.Summary: HTTP 410 — the resource is permanently gone.

files.Title: Trellis.Error.InternalServerError
files.Summary: HTTP 500 — an unhandled server-side fault occurred.

files.Title: Trellis.Error.MethodNotAllowed
files.Summary: HTTP 405 — the HTTP method is not supported by the target resource.

files.Title: Trellis.Error.NotAcceptable
files.Summary: HTTP 406 — none of the available representations are acceptable to the client.

files.Title: Trellis.Error.NotFound
files.Summary: HTTP 404 — the requested resource does not exist.

files.Title: Trellis.Error.NotImplemented
files.Summary: HTTP 501 — the requested feature is not implemented.

files.Title: Trellis.Error.PreconditionFailed
files.Summary: HTTP 412 — a request precondition (e.g. If-Match) failed.

files.Title: Trellis.Error.PreconditionRequired
files.Summary: HTTP 428 — the resource requires a precondition that the request did not include.

files.Title: Trellis.Error.RangeNotSatisfiable
files.Summary: HTTP 416 — the requested byte range cannot be satisfied.

files.Title: Trellis.Error.ServiceUnavailable
files.Summary: HTTP 503 — the server is temporarily unable to handle the request.

files.Title: Trellis.Error.TooManyRequests
files.Summary: HTTP 429 — the client has exceeded a rate limit.

files.Title: Trellis.Error.Unauthorized
files.Summary: HTTP 401 — authentication is required or has failed.

files.Title: Trellis.Error.Unexpected
files.Summary: HTTP 500 — a "shouldn't happen" condition. Used for default-initialized /, exhausted match arms, or other internal invariant violations whose root cause is a programming error rather than a documented server-side fault.

files.Title: Trellis.Error.UnprocessableContent
files.Summary: HTTP 422 — the request was well-formed but the content failed semantic validation.

files.Title: Trellis.Error.UnsupportedMediaType
files.Summary: HTTP 415 — the request's media type is not supported.

files.Title: Trellis.Error
files.Summary: Closed discriminated union of error values. Each case is a nested sealed record that mirrors a status from the IANA HTTP Status Code Registry (RFC 9110, RFC 6585) and carries a strongly-typed payload describing what went wrong.

files.Title: Trellis.FieldViolation
files.Summary: Describes a validation failure attached to a specific field of an input document. Used inside .

files.Title: Trellis.FluentValidation.FluentValidationMessageValidatorAdapter<TMessage>
files.Summary: Adapts FluentValidation implementations into the Trellis Mediator validation stage. Resolves every IValidator<TMessage> registered in DI, runs them, and returns an aggregated failure when any validator reports errors.

files.Title: Trellis.FluentValidation.FluentValidationResultExtensions
files.Summary: Provides extension methods to integrate FluentValidation with Railway Oriented Programming Result types. Enables seamless conversion of FluentValidation results to Result<T> for functional error handling.

files.Title: Trellis.FluentValidation.FluentValidationServiceCollectionExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods for plugging FluentValidation into the Trellis Mediator validation stage.

files.Title: Trellis.GetValueOrDefaultExtensions
files.Summary: Terminal extraction methods for Result values.

files.Title: Trellis.Http.HttpResponseExtensions
files.Summary: Canonical Railway-Oriented HTTP extensions for .

files.Title: Trellis.IAggregate
files.Summary: Defines the contract for an aggregate root in Domain-Driven Design. An aggregate is a cluster of domain objects that can be treated as a single unit for data changes.

files.Title: Trellis.IDomainEvent
files.Summary: Represents a domain event - a record of something significant that happened in the business domain. Domain events capture state changes and business occurrences that domain experts care about.

files.Title: Trellis.IEntity
files.Summary: Non-generic interface for all entities in Domain-Driven Design. Provides automatic timestamp tracking — records when the entity was first persisted, and tracks the most recent change.

files.Title: Trellis.IFailureFactory<TSelf>
files.Summary: Enables construction of a failure result of the implementing type from an . Implemented by to support generic pipeline behaviors that need to construct failure results without knowing the inner type parameter.

files.Title: Trellis.IFormattableScalarValue<TSelf, TPrimitive>
files.Summary: Extended interface for scalar value objects that support culture-sensitive string parsing. Use for numeric and date types where matters for parsing.

files.Title: Trellis.IResult<TValue>
files.Summary: Generic interface for result types, providing typed access to the success value.

files.Title: Trellis.IResult
files.Summary: Non-generic base interface for result types, exposing success/failure state and error information.

files.Title: Trellis.IScalarValue<TSelf, TPrimitive>
files.Summary: Interface for scalar value objects that can be created with validation. Enables automatic ASP.NET Core model binding and JSON serialization.

files.Title: Trellis.InputPointer
files.Summary: A pointer into a structured input document, expressed as an RFC 6901 JSON Pointer. Used by validation errors to identify the location of an offending value.

files.Title: Trellis.MapExtensions
files.Summary: Provides extension methods for mapping (transforming) values inside Result objects.

files.Title: Trellis.MapExtensionsAsync
files.Summary: Provides asynchronous extension methods for mapping (transforming) values inside Result objects.

files.Title: Trellis.MapIfExtensions
files.Summary: Conditionally transforms the value inside a Result when a condition or predicate is met.

files.Title: Trellis.MapOnFailureExtensions
files.Summary: Provides extension methods for transforming errors in failed Results while leaving successful Results unchanged.

files.Title: Trellis.MatchExtensions
files.Summary: Pattern matching helpers (Match / Switch) for Result.

files.Title: Trellis.MatchExtensionsAsync
files.Summary: Asynchronous pattern matching helpers for Result.

files.Title: Trellis.Maybe<T>
files.Summary: Represents domain-level optionality — a value that was either provided or intentionally omitted. Unlike (value types only) or T? (annotation only for reference types), is a real generic type that works uniformly with both value and reference types and composes with pipelines.

files.Title: Trellis.Maybe
files.Summary: Contains static methods to create a object.

files.Title: Trellis.MaybeChooseExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods for filtering and unwrapping collections.

files.Title: Trellis.MaybeCollectionExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods for safely querying collections, returning instead of throwing.

files.Title: Trellis.MaybeExtensions
files.Summary: Provides extension methods for converting instances to objects and for wrapping values in a .

files.Title: Trellis.MaybeExtensionsAsync
files.Summary: Asynchronous MatchAsync extension methods for and of .

files.Title: Trellis.MaybeInvariant
files.Summary: Provides static methods for validating invariants across multiple values. These methods express relationships between correlated optional values — such as "all or none", "if A then B", or "exactly one" — and return with field-level details when the invariant is violated.

files.Title: Trellis.MaybeLinqExtensions
files.Summary: Provides LINQ query expression support for Maybe types, enabling C# query syntax for optional value composition.

files.Title: Trellis.Mediator.AuthorizationBehavior<TMessage, TResponse>
files.Summary: Pipeline behavior that checks the current actor has all permissions declared in . Short-circuits with if any permission is missing.

files.Title: Trellis.Mediator.ExceptionBehavior<TMessage, TResponse>
files.Summary: Pipeline behavior that catches unhandled exceptions from handlers and converts them to failures. This is a safety net — handlers should not throw, but if they do, this prevents unhandled exceptions from escaping the mediator pipeline.

files.Title: Trellis.Mediator.IMessageValidator<TMessage>
files.Summary: Contributes a validation step to the unified validation stage of the Trellis Mediator pipeline ().

files.Title: Trellis.Mediator.IValidate
files.Summary: Marker interface for commands/queries that can self-validate before reaching the handler. Implement on command/query records to enable the .

files.Title: Trellis.Mediator.LoggingBehavior<TMessage, TResponse>
files.Summary: Pipeline behavior that logs command/query execution with duration and Result outcome. Logs at Information level for success, Warning level for failure.

files.Title: Trellis.Mediator.ResourceAuthorizationBehavior<TMessage, TResource, TResponse>
files.Summary: Pipeline behavior that loads a resource and performs resource-based authorization before the handler runs. Registered as scoped so the injected is the request-scoped provider, allowing correct resolution of scoped dependencies.

files.Title: Trellis.Mediator.ServiceCollectionExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods for registering Trellis.Mediator pipeline behaviors.

files.Title: Trellis.Mediator.TracingBehavior<TMessage, TResponse>
files.Summary: Pipeline behavior that creates an OpenTelemetry Activity for each command/query. Tags the activity with Result status and error details on failure.

files.Title: Trellis.Mediator.TrellisMediatorTelemetryOptions
files.Summary: Operator-tunable redaction settings for the Trellis mediator pipeline's logging and tracing behaviors. Resolved from DI; if not registered, the behaviors fall back to the safe-by-default values exposed by this type's parameterless constructor.

files.Title: Trellis.Mediator.ValidationBehavior<TMessage, TResponse>
files.Summary: Unified validation stage of the Trellis Mediator pipeline. Runs the compile-time contract (when the message implements it) and every registered for TMessage in DI, aggregates all failures into a single response failure, and short-circuits the pipeline before the handler is invoked.

files.Title: Trellis.NullableExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods for converting nullable values to Result types. Provides a convenient way to handle null checking with Railway Oriented Programming.

files.Title: Trellis.NullableExtensionsAsync
files.Summary: Asynchronous extension methods for converting nullable values to Result types.

files.Title: Trellis.Page<T>
files.Summary: A single page of items from a paginated collection together with the cursors needed to fetch adjacent pages. The canonical Trellis primitive for server-driven pagination.

files.Title: Trellis.Page
files.Summary: Non-generic factory companion for . Mirrors the Result / Result<T> split: factory methods live on the non-generic type to keep generic-type surface minimal (CA1000) and to allow type inference at the call site.

files.Title: Trellis.ParsableJsonConverter<T>
files.Summary: A JSON converter for value objects that implement . Enables automatic serialization and deserialization of parsable value objects in ASP.NET Core APIs and System.Text.Json scenarios.

files.Title: Trellis.PreconditionKind
files.Summary: Identifies which conditional precondition was the subject of a or error.

files.Title: Trellis.PrimitiveValueObjectTrace
files.Summary: Provides OpenTelemetry activity tracing for Trellis primitive value object operations. Enables monitoring and diagnostics of value object creation, validation, and parsing activities.

files.Title: Trellis.PrimitiveValueObjectTraceProviderBuilderExtensions
files.Summary: Provides extension methods for configuring OpenTelemetry tracing for Trellis primitive value objects.

files.Title: Trellis.Primitives.Age
files.Summary: Age value object with validation for ages 0-150.

files.Title: Trellis.Primitives.CompositeValueObjectJsonConverter<T>
files.Summary: Convention-based for composite value objects.

files.Title: Trellis.Primitives.CountryCode
files.Summary: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code value object.

files.Title: Trellis.Primitives.CurrencyCode
files.Summary: Represents an ISO 4217 currency code as a value object.

files.Title: Trellis.Primitives.EmailAddress
files.Summary: Represents an email address value object with RFC 5322-compliant validation. Ensures that email addresses are syntactically valid and prevents invalid email data in the domain model.

files.Title: Trellis.Primitives.Hostname
files.Summary: RFC 1123 compliant hostname value object.

files.Title: Trellis.Primitives.IpAddress
files.Summary: Represents an IP address (IPv4 or IPv6) as a value object.

files.Title: Trellis.Primitives.LanguageCode
files.Summary: ISO 639-1 language code value object.

files.Title: Trellis.Primitives.MonetaryAmount
files.Summary:
A non-negative monetary amount without currency — for single-currency systems.

Use when your bounded context operates in a single currency (e.g., all USD). The currency is a system-wide policy, not per-row data. Maps to a single decimal(18,2) column in EF Core via ApplyTrellisConventions.

For multi-currency systems where each value carries its own currency code, use instead.

files.Title: Trellis.Primitives.Money
files.Summary: Represents a structured monetary value object composed of an amount and currency code. Provides type-safe arithmetic operations that prevent mixing different currencies.

files.Title: Trellis.Primitives.Percentage
files.Summary: Represents a percentage value object (value between 0 and 100 inclusive). Ensures that percentage values are within the valid range for percentage calculations.

files.Title: Trellis.Primitives.PhoneNumber
files.Summary: Represents a phone number value object with E.164 format validation. Ensures that phone numbers follow international standards for telephony.

files.Title: Trellis.Primitives.Slug
files.Summary: URL-safe slug value object (lowercase letters, digits, single hyphens).

files.Title: Trellis.Primitives.Url
files.Summary: Represents a URL value object with format validation. Ensures that URLs are valid and well-formed for web and API scenarios.

files.Title: Trellis.RailwayTrackAttribute
files.Summary: Indicates which railway track an operation executes on. This metadata can be used by IDE extensions, analyzers, and documentation generators.

files.Title: Trellis.RangeAttribute
files.Summary: Specifies the minimum and maximum allowed values for numeric value objects (, , ).

files.Title: Trellis.RecoverExtensions
files.Summary: Provides extension methods for recovering from failures with a fallback value. Unlike which requires a function returning a Result, Recover takes a simple fallback value and always produces a success.

files.Title: Trellis.RecoverExtensionsAsync
files.Summary: Provides asynchronous extension methods for recovering from failures with a fallback value.

files.Title: Trellis.RecoverOnFailureExtensions
files.Summary: Provides extension methods for recovering from failed results by executing fallback operations.

files.Title: Trellis.RecoverOnFailureExtensionsAsync
files.Summary: Provides asynchronous extension methods for recovering from failed results.

files.Title: Trellis.RepresentationMetadata.Builder
files.Summary: Fluent builder for constructing instances.

files.Title: Trellis.RepresentationMetadata
files.Summary: Carries HTTP representation metadata (RFC 9110 §8) through Trellis response mappers. Used to emit ETag, Last-Modified, Vary, Content-Language, Content-Location, and Accept-Ranges response headers consistently across MVC and Minimal API responses (200, 201, 206, 304).

files.Title: Trellis.RequiredBool<TSelf>
files.Summary: Base class for creating strongly-typed boolean value objects that distinguish between false (an explicit value) and null/missing (no value provided).

files.Title: Trellis.RequiredDateTime<TSelf>
files.Summary: Base class for creating strongly-typed DateTime value objects that prevent primitive obsession for dates. Rejects as the "empty" equivalent.

files.Title: Trellis.RequiredDecimal<TSelf>
files.Summary: Base class for creating strongly-typed decimal value objects that must be explicitly provided. Provides a foundation for monetary amounts, percentages, and other domain concepts represented by decimals.

files.Title: Trellis.RequiredEnum<TSelf>
files.Summary: Base class for creating strongly-typed, behavior-rich enumeration value objects. Enum value objects are a DDD pattern that replaces C# enums with full-featured classes.

files.Title: Trellis.RequiredEnumJsonConverter<TRequiredEnum>
files.Summary: JSON converter for types. Serializes to the string value and deserializes from string value.

files.Title: Trellis.RequiredGuid<TSelf>
files.Summary: Base class for creating strongly-typed GUID value objects that cannot have the default (empty) GUID value. Provides a foundation for entity identifiers and other domain concepts represented by GUIDs.

files.Title: Trellis.RequiredInt<TSelf>
files.Summary: Base class for creating strongly-typed integer value objects that must be explicitly provided. Provides a foundation for entity identifiers, counts, and other domain concepts represented by integers.

files.Title: Trellis.RequiredLong<TSelf>
files.Summary: Base class for creating strongly-typed long integer value objects. Provides a foundation for large identifiers, sequence numbers, and other domain concepts represented by long integers.

files.Title: Trellis.RequiredString<TSelf>
files.Summary: Base class for creating strongly-typed string value objects that cannot be null or empty. Provides a foundation for domain primitives like names, descriptions, codes, and other textual concepts.

files.Title: Trellis.ResourceRef
files.Summary: Identifies a resource by its type and optional identifier. Used as the typed payload for resource-oriented errors such as , , , and .

files.Title: Trellis.Result<TValue>
files.Summary: Represents either a successful computation (with a value) or a failure (with an ).

files.Title: Trellis.Result
files.Summary: Static factory and helper methods for constructing values.

files.Title: Trellis.ResultDebugExtensions
files.Summary: Debug extension methods for inspecting Result values during development. These methods execute only in DEBUG builds and become no-ops in RELEASE builds (with zero overhead).

files.Title: Trellis.ResultDebugExtensionsAsync
files.Summary: Debug-only async extension methods for inspecting Result values during development. These methods are only available in DEBUG builds and are automatically excluded from RELEASE builds. Debug information is written to dedicated Activity spans for OpenTelemetry compatibility.

files.Title: Trellis.ResultDebugSettings
files.Summary: Controls runtime behavior of methods (Debug, DebugDetailed, DebugWithStack, DebugOnSuccess, DebugOnFailure).

files.Title: Trellis.ResultLinqExtensions
files.Summary: Provides LINQ query expression support for Result types, enabling C# query syntax for functional operations.

files.Title: Trellis.ResultLinqExtensionsTaskAsync
files.Summary: Provides LINQ query expression support for of , enabling C# query syntax over fully asynchronous Result-returning operations.

files.Title: Trellis.ResultLinqExtensionsTaskLeftAsync
files.Summary: Async LINQ SelectMany overload where the source is a of and the collection selector is synchronous.

files.Title: Trellis.ResultLinqExtensionsTaskRightAsync
files.Summary: Async LINQ SelectMany overload where the source is a synchronous and the collection selector returns a of .

files.Title: Trellis.ResultLinqExtensionsValueTaskAsync
files.Summary: Provides LINQ query expression support for of , enabling C# query syntax over fully asynchronous Result-returning operations that may complete synchronously.

files.Title: Trellis.ResultLinqExtensionsValueTaskLeftAsync
files.Summary: Async LINQ SelectMany overload where the source is a of and the collection selector is synchronous.

files.Title: Trellis.ResultLinqExtensionsValueTaskRightAsync
files.Summary: Async LINQ SelectMany overload where the source is a synchronous and the collection selector returns a of .

files.Title: Trellis.ResultTaskAdapterExtensions
files.Summary: Provides adapters that wrap already-computed values in completed task-like carriers.

files.Title: Trellis.ResultsTraceProviderBuilderExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods for configuring OpenTelemetry tracing for Railway Oriented Programming operations.

files.Title: Trellis.RetryAfterValue
files.Summary: Represents an RFC 9110 §10.2.3 Retry-After value, which can be either a delay in seconds or an absolute HTTP-date indicating when the client may retry.

files.Title: Trellis.RuleViolation
files.Summary: Describes a global or multi-field business-rule failure attached to a . Use this for invariant violations that are not bound to a single field (e.g. "order_must_have_items", "passwords_must_match", "cancel_after_ship").

files.Title: Trellis.ScalarValueObject<TSelf, T>
files.Summary: Base class for value objects that wrap a single scalar value. Provides a strongly-typed wrapper around primitive types with domain semantics.

files.Title: Trellis.SequenceAllExtensions
files.Summary: Accumulating-error counterpart to . Runs through every item; folds failures via the existing extension so two failures merge their fields/rules and heterogeneous failures flatten into .

files.Title: Trellis.Specification<T>
files.Summary: Base class for the Specification pattern. Encapsulates a business rule as a composable, storage-agnostic expression tree.

files.Title: Trellis.StateMachine.LazyStateMachine<TState, TTrigger>
files.Summary: A lazy wrapper around that defers machine construction until first use, solving the EF Core materialization problem.

files.Title: Trellis.StateMachine.StateMachineExtensions
files.Summary: Provides extension methods for that return instead of throwing on invalid transitions.

files.Title: Trellis.StringExtensions
files.Summary: String manipulation helpers for value object field name normalization.

files.Title: Trellis.StringLengthAttribute
files.Summary: Specifies the minimum and maximum length of characters that are allowed in a -derived value object.

files.Title: Trellis.TapExtensions
files.Summary: Provides extension methods for executing side effects on successful Results without changing the Result.

files.Title: Trellis.TapExtensionsAsync
files.Summary: Provides asynchronous extension methods for executing side effects on successful Results without changing the Result.

files.Title: Trellis.TapOnFailureExtensions
files.Summary: Provides extension methods for executing side effects on failed Results without changing the Result.

files.Title: Trellis.TapOnFailureExtensionsAsync
files.Summary: Provides asynchronous extension methods for executing side effects on failed Results without changing the Result.

files.Title: Trellis.Testing.AggregateTestMutator
files.Summary: Reflection-based helpers for setting source-generated backing fields in test scenarios. Works on the CLR object directly — no DbContext needed for the mutation itself.

files.Title: Trellis.Testing.AspNetCore.Http.ExpectedOutcome
files.Summary: Expected outcome parsed from # pragmas in a .http file.

files.Title: Trellis.Testing.AspNetCore.Http.HttpFileAssertionException
files.Summary: Raised by when a request's expectations are not met. Carries a descriptive message identifying the offending request by title so failures are easy to triage in CI.

files.Title: Trellis.Testing.AspNetCore.Http.HttpFileAssertions
files.Summary: Verifies that an satisfies its attached .

files.Title: Trellis.Testing.AspNetCore.Http.HttpFileParser
files.Summary: Parses a .http file (VS Code REST Client / Visual Studio format) into a sequence of values ready to be replayed by .

files.Title: Trellis.Testing.AspNetCore.Http.HttpFileRequest
files.Summary: A single HTTP request parsed from a .http file (VS Code REST Client / Visual Studio HTTP file format).

files.Title: Trellis.Testing.AspNetCore.Http.HttpFileResult
files.Summary: Result of replaying a single .

files.Title: Trellis.Testing.AspNetCore.Http.HttpFileRunner
files.Summary: Executes a parsed .http file against an , threading a through the requests so named responses can be referenced via {{name.response.body.*}} substitutions.

files.Title: Trellis.Testing.AspNetCore.Http.HttpFileTheoryData
files.Summary: Produces [MemberData]-compatible test cases from a .http file. Returns IEnumerable<object[]> rather than an xUnit-specific TheoryData<T> so this helper carries no xUnit dependency from the library itself; consumer test projects can freely wrap with TheoryData<HttpFileRequest> if they prefer the typed variant.

files.Title: Trellis.Testing.AspNetCore.Http.ScenarioContext
files.Summary: Mutable state shared across a sequence of HTTP file requests. Captures each # foo-annotated response so later requests can reference {{foo.response.body.x}} / {{foo.response.headers.Name}}.

files.Title: Trellis.Testing.AspNetCore.MsalTestOptions
files.Summary: Configuration options for acquiring real Azure Entra ID tokens in E2E integration tests using MSAL (Microsoft Authentication Library).

files.Title: Trellis.Testing.AspNetCore.MsalTestTokenProvider
files.Summary: Acquires real Azure Entra ID tokens for E2E integration tests using the MSAL ROPC (Resource Owner Password Credentials) flow.

files.Title: Trellis.Testing.AspNetCore.ServiceCollectionDbProviderExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods for that simplify replacing EF Core database provider registrations in integration tests.

files.Title: Trellis.Testing.AspNetCore.ServiceCollectionExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods for that simplify replacing service registrations in integration tests.

files.Title: Trellis.Testing.AspNetCore.TestUserCredentials
files.Summary: Credentials for a named test user in an Azure Entra ID test tenant. Used with to configure E2E integration tests that authenticate with real JWT tokens.

files.Title: Trellis.Testing.AspNetCore.WebApplicationFactoryExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods for that simplify creating authenticated HTTP clients for integration tests.

files.Title: Trellis.Testing.AspNetCore.WebApplicationFactoryTimeExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods for that simplify controlling time in integration tests.

files.Title: Trellis.Testing.ErrorAssertions
files.Summary: Contains assertion methods for Error types.

files.Title: Trellis.Testing.ErrorAssertionsExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods to enable FluentAssertions on Error types.

files.Title: Trellis.Testing.FakeRepository<TAggregate, TId>
files.Summary: In-memory fake repository for testing aggregates. Provides a simple in-memory store with domain event tracking.

files.Title: Trellis.Testing.FakeSharedResourceLoader<TResource, TId>
files.Summary: In-memory fake implementation of that delegates to a . Use in application-layer tests to wire resource-based authorization without hand-writing a loader per command.

files.Title: Trellis.Testing.MaybeAssertions<T>
files.Summary: Contains assertion methods for Maybe types.

files.Title: Trellis.Testing.MaybeAssertionsExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods to enable FluentAssertions on Maybe types.

files.Title: Trellis.Testing.ResultAssertions<TValue>
files.Summary: Contains assertion methods for Result types.

files.Title: Trellis.Testing.ResultAssertionsAsyncExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods to enable FluentAssertions on async Result types (Task and ValueTask).

files.Title: Trellis.Testing.ResultAssertionsExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods to enable FluentAssertions on Result types.

files.Title: Trellis.Testing.TestActorProvider
files.Summary: Mutable for integration and authorization testing. Stores the current actor in an so parallel tests using overlapping scopes never interfere with each other.

files.Title: Trellis.Testing.TestActorScope
files.Summary: Captures the current and restores it on dispose. Created by . Supports both await using and using patterns.

files.Title: Trellis.Testing.UnwrapExtensions
files.Summary: Provides Unwrap() extension methods for extracting values from and in test code. These methods throw a descriptive exception on failure/none rather than letting the test crash with an opaque error, keeping the test intent explicit.

files.Title: Trellis.Testing.UnwrapFailedException
files.Summary: Exception thrown when or is called on a failure/none value. Provides a descriptive message including the error details for test diagnostics.

files.Title: Trellis.Testing.ValidationErrorAssertions
files.Summary: Contains assertion methods for .

files.Title: Trellis.Testing.ValidationErrorAssertionsExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods to enable FluentAssertions on .

files.Title: Trellis.ToMaybeExtensions
files.Summary: Provides extension methods for converting Result{T} to Maybe{T}. Success results become Some(value), failure results become None.

files.Title: Trellis.ToMaybeExtensionsAsync
files.Summary: Provides asynchronous extension methods for converting Result{T} to Maybe{T}.

files.Title: Trellis.TrackBehavior
files.Summary: Defines which railway track an operation runs on in Railway-Oriented Programming.

files.Title: Trellis.TraverseAllExtensions
files.Summary: Accumulating-error counterpart to . Runs the selector over every item (no short-circuit) and folds failures via the existing extension. Useful for form-style validation where every error matters, not just the first one encountered.

files.Title: Trellis.TraverseExtensions
files.Summary: Transforms a collection of items into a Result containing a collection, short-circuiting on the first failure. Useful for processing collections where each item can fail independently.

files.Title: Trellis.TrellisJsonValidationException
files.Summary: Thrown by Trellis JSON converters when a structured value object's invariants are violated during deserialization (e.g., Money's amount/currency rules).

files.Title: Trellis.Unit
files.Summary: Sentinel type representing the absence of a meaningful value. Used as the type parameter for no-payload results: Result<Unit> represents an operation that either succeeds without producing a value or fails with an .

files.Title: Trellis.ValueObject
files.Summary: Base class for value objects in Domain-Driven Design. A value object represents a descriptive aspect of the domain with no conceptual identity. Value objects are immutable, defined by their attributes, and support structural equality.

files.Title: Trellis.WhenExtensions
files.Summary: Conditionally executes an operation based on a predicate, maintaining the railway. Useful for executing operations only when certain conditions are met without breaking the Result chain.

files.Title: Trellis.WhenExtensionsAsync
files.Summary: Asynchronous conditional execution operations for Result.

files.Title: Trellis.WriteOutcome<T>.Accepted
files.Summary: The write was accepted for asynchronous processing and a status body is returned. Transports as HTTP 202 Accepted.

files.Title: Trellis.WriteOutcome<T>.AcceptedNoContent
files.Summary: The write was accepted for asynchronous processing with no status body. Transports as HTTP 202 Accepted.

files.Title: Trellis.WriteOutcome<T>.Created
files.Summary: A new resource was created. Transports as HTTP 201 Created.

files.Title: Trellis.WriteOutcome<T>.Updated
files.Summary: An existing resource was replaced/updated and the new representation is returned. Transports as HTTP 200 OK.

files.Title: Trellis.WriteOutcome<T>.UpdatedNoContent
files.Summary: An existing resource was replaced/updated and no body is returned. Transports as HTTP 204 No Content.

files.Title: Trellis.WriteOutcome<T>
files.Summary: Represents the outcome of a write operation (create / replace / accept-for-async) returned by Application-layer repositories. The case selected describes what happened in transport-agnostic terms; transport adapters (e.g. Trellis.Asp) translate each case to a protocol-specific response (HTTP status code + headers, gRPC status, queue ack envelope, etc.).
